stimulus.content:
Read the passage below:

When the Constitution was first written, some people worried it did not protect individual freedoms. So the founders added ten amendments. These amendments are called the Bill of Rights.

stem: Based on the passage, what was the main purpose of the Bill of Rights?

choices.text: To create the three branches of government
To protect the rights of individual people
To set up rules for collecting taxes
To explain how states would be added

answer_explanation: The Bill of Rights was added to protect individual freedoms. It does not create the branches of government, set tax rules, or explain how new states join the country.
